title: calophyllum austroindicum
intro: Calophyllum austroindicum is a species of evergreen tree that belongs to the family Calophyllaceae and is native to the tropical regions of India and Southeast Asia. The plant has been traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Calophyllum austroindicum include the treatment of various skin conditions, wound healing, and the management of fever and respiratory issues. Herbal preparations of the plant include extracts, oils, and infusions that can be used topically or internally, but it is essential to consult with a healthcare professional before using any medicinal plant.
